seeAlso.title: Referral and Transport of the sick NYI

learningObjectives: Identify all fields and sections that appear on the Neonatal Referral Form.
Explain how the referral form is used in the assessment and transfer of sick newborns.
Locate and view high‑resolution images of the complete form and its detailed sections.
Access related resources for referral and transport of newborns.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: This appendix provides a visual reference for the Neonatal Referral Form. The form is used when referring a sick newborn (NYI) to a higher‑level facility.
learningObjectives: Recognize the purpose of the Neonatal Referral Form within the health‑care system.

sections.title: Referral Form – Full View
sections.content: The first image shows the complete Neonatal Referral Form. Zoom in for details.
learningObjectives: Identify each major section of the form (patient details, clinical findings, transport details, etc.).

sections.title: Referral Form – Detailed Section
sections.content: The second image provides a close‑up of a specific part of the form that often requires careful completion.
learningObjectives: Interpret the detailed fields highlighted in the zoomed section.

subsections.title: Detailed Section Image
subsections.description: Zoomed view of a particular section of the Neonatal Referral Form.
